name: aistudycamp-skills
description: Installable Claude Code skills for AI Study Camp students.

plugins.name: visualization
plugins.description: Build polished single-file HTML slide decks, dashboards, and diagrams. Ships as a customizable template.

plugins.name: idea-breakdown
plugins.description: Turn one big idea or a list of automation ideas into a prioritized, classified build plan.

plugins.name: map-my-setup
plugins.description: Audit a Claude Code setup and produce a shareable single-file HTML dashboard - every CLAUDE.md, skill, agent, command, hook, and MCP server, flagged for bloat and version-control gaps, with an interactive folder map and prioritized recommendations.
